title: Guild quest pool (v1)
description: The level-banded catalogue of cooperative guild-quest objectives a guild's single active guild quest is drawn from. Every guild is assigned one active 'slay N of a mob type' objective at a time; progress accrues automatically for the whole guild whenever any online member kills the matching mob type (no ACCEPT needed), mirroring the personal kill-quest credit in QuestKillService. On completion the reward gold is paid straight into the guild treasury (also advancing the guild's lifetime deposited gold and GuildLevel), a [Guild] announcement fires, and a fresh objective is rolled. The active objective is otherwise re-rolled once per game day (NIGHT->DAY transition, GuildQuestRotationTicker), the same cadence as daily quests. Assignment is level-banded: a guild is only assigned objectives whose min_guild_level is at or below its current level rank. Pool files live under data/quests/guild/<name>.json and the loader tolerates unknown properties (AGENTS.md §11). Per-guild progress is not stored here; it lives on the Guild (guild schema v4, activeGuildQuest).

name.description: Optional display name of the pool.

objectives.description: The guild-quest objectives, ordered low to high level band. At least one objective must have min_guild_level 1 so every guild is eligible.

id.description: Unique objective id across the whole pool.

name.description: Display name shown to guild members (e.g. 'Cull the Dire Wolves').

target_mob_id.description: Mob template id whose kills advance this objective.

target_name.description: Plural display noun used in progress lines (e.g. 'dire wolves').

required_kills.description: Number of matching kills needed to complete the objective.

gold_reward.description: Gold paid into the guild treasury on completion.

min_guild_level.description: Lowest guild level rank (1-5) eligible to be assigned this objective.
